primary_text:
I've walked this paddock. I know this farmer. I've watched how these animals are raised.

No feedlots. No hormones. Just open pasture and honest farming.

I co-founded FarmThru because I believe every family deserves to know where their food comes from. Not just a label. The actual farm, the actual person.

50+ regenerative farms across NSW. Collected fresh from your nearest hub.

We'll show you where your food comes from.

-- Rachel Ward, co-founder
headline: I've walked this paddock
description: Rachel Ward, co-founder. 50+ regenerative farms, collected from your hub.
creative_brief: Rachel walking through green paddock, mid-stride, natural expression. Documentary style. No posing. Overlaid quote in her voice.
